content: TASK-074 checkpoint done: Prototype Play controls are clarified. Play screen content can now be zoomed with +/-/Fit controls, fallback screen cards are larger by default, hotspots are only offered when the current screen has frame metadata and outgoing hotspot definitions, and Back/Next/Reset disable when they have no action. Product guidance: hotspots are for image-based clickable prototype regions; Back/Next are for scenario playback/history, not required for pure map reading. Verification: npm run typecheck, npm test -- --run test/prototype.test.ts, and npm run build passed. TASK-056 broader performance remains open.
